ocr_findings.description: Answer line at bottom of page '問題4-1 ウ　問題4-2 エ　問題4-3 エ　問題4-4 ア' is present and correct in cleaned OCR. No loss detected.

reviewer_notes: Page contains four exam questions (問題4-1 through 4-4) with ア/イ/ウ/エ multiple-choice answers. The cleaned OCR is excellent — all question stems, multi-line choice options, year annotations (令和元年度, 平成28年度, 平成31年度, 令和5年度), and the answer key line are faithfully reproduced. The 解答・解説はp.142参照 reference line is also captured. Horizontal rule separators added by the cleaned OCR are a reasonable structural addition.
